painPoints.title: Do These Problems Sound Familiar?
painPoints.card1_desc: No system, no SL/TP, placing orders based on emotion — and blowing your account over and over again.
painPoints.card2_desc: Too much information out there. Every YouTube tutorial teaches something different — the more you learn, the more confused you get.
painPoints.card3_desc: Trading day to day with no plan — no idea what your monthly profit target or risk tolerance should be.
painPoints.solution_suffix: from the fundamentals all the way to a real trading plan.

aboutCredibility.title: Meet
aboutCredibility.subtitle: A real trader who wants to share a system that actually works
aboutCredibility.name: BigLot
aboutCredibility.story: I blew my account before — trading without a system, no SL, no Money Management. Once I got serious about planning, everything changed. I wrote this eBook so you don't have to go through the pain I did.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a_1: Connext is a properly registered broker with international-standard security systems. It supports MT5 and has a dedicated Thai-language support team.
faq.q_2: How quickly will I receive the eBook?
faq.a_2: The free eBook (Vol. 1) is sent instantly via email after submitting the form. Premium and VIP eBooks are delivered within 24 hours after our team verifies your deposit slip.
faq.q_3: Do I need prior trading experience?
faq.a_3: Not at all. eBook Vol. 1 is designed for complete beginners with zero trading experience. It walks you through the basics all the way to placing your first order.
faq.a_4: Yes. Your deposit goes into your trading account. You can trade with it or withdraw it anytime — it's not a fee.
faq.q_5: Is Discord VIP a monthly subscription?
faq.a_5: No. A one-time deposit of $500 grants you lifetime Discord VIP membership with no additional charges.
faq.q_6: Where can I get help if I have a problem?
faq.a_6: Add @BigLot on Line OA — our team is ready to answer any questions. VIP members can also chat directly in the Discord channels.

finalCta.heading: Ready to Start Trading?
finalCta.description: Sign up with Connext, open a Demo account, and practice your system for real.
finalCta.cta_sub: Not sure? Add us on Line and ask our team.

footer.risk_text: Trading Forex and CFDs carries a high level of risk. You may lose your entire investment. Please study all information thoroughly before making any investment decisions. The content in this eBook is for educational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice. Past trading results are not a guarantee of future performance.
